$schema_note: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the Anthology Writer pipeline. The deterministic orchestrator run_anthology.py walks these phases IN ORDER (P0 -> P0A-AVATAR -> P1..P7) with NO phase skips, one contributor at a time. P0A-AVATAR is the pre-P1 avatar handoff (W1.2 extension): it DELEGATES to Skill 52 avatar-alchemist prompts 01-03 BY PATH (see avatar_handoff below; NO file copied, tone core untouched; the avatar handoff itself adds NO source_prompt_pins entry — the aw-11/aw-12 baked-IP pins are added by the separate W1.3 prompt-completion extension) and produces working/avatar.md, which run_anthology.py's _chk_avatar gate REQUIRES fail-closed via scripts/prove_aw_avatar.py (AF-AW-AVATAR-*) BEFORE P1-FIDELITY runs; the dossier is consumed by the downstream tone/chapter authoring templates (carried_values), not read by the P1-FIDELITY checker itself. Each phase declares its produces_artifact, its _chk_* preflight symbol, and its AF-AW-* gate codes. Every AF-AW-* code below is enforced by a fail-closed, model-free, stdlib-only prover in scripts/; py_symbol names the function that decides it. Editing this file is step (i) of any Anthology change: add the gate, add the AF code here with its trigger, add the checker, add the golden+attack fixture.
design_law: Enforcement, not description. Bands and counts are measured on the STRIPPED text of the artifact; a model's self-reported word count is NEVER trusted. Client runtime uses the CLIENT's own provider chain (assets/model-map.template.json) resolved to the strongest NON-Anthropic model per tier — NEVER Anthropic/claude-* ids or operator keys (build-fix: everywhere the source said 'OpenRouter primary'/anthropic-* is implemented as 'the client's strongest NON-Anthropic model'). The deterministic gates are provider-neutral Python that run identically everywhere. A client-exact override wins over a default band and is recorded on the certificate.
shared_tone_core_contract: This skill bakes a lockstep copy of shared-utils/tone-writing-core/prompts/04..08 into prompts/ and proves it with scripts/verify_tone_core_sync.py at build/CI time. 54 is a SEPARATE skill sharing the ONE tone core (Trevor's standing decision), sibling of 53-book-writer.

source_prompt_pins_provenance.$note: RUNTIME pin granularity reconciliation (W1.3). source_prompt_pins maps each baked SINGLE-FILE authoring asset (assets/prompts/NN-*.md) to the sha256 of its BYTES — the ONE granularity prove_aw_fidelity.py enforces at merge and runtime (SPEC 3.2 item 2). The pins live in ONE place: THIS manifest's source_prompt_pins (SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH); no second/parallel pins file ships in the repo. The n8n SOURCE prompts were multi-component (system/assistant/user); their per-component raw+pinned sha256 and the composite_pin are SOURCE provenance that lives OPERATOR-SIDE ONLY in .build-state/W0.2.json (never committed — the exports carry live keys) — this manifest deliberately ships neither that per-component/composite ledger nor any legacy n8n slot expression.
source_prompt_pins_provenance.byte_proof_08_10: aw-08 and aw-10 were byte-proved at W1.3 against their recorded pins (08 sha256 5a944eaf…, 10 sha256 56c4bf76…): BOTH MATCH the source-of-record — NO re-pin (the pin inventory ends COMPLETE either way, the actual law). Zero [UNCHANGED] placeholders remain in any baked body; a pin carrying an unrestored placeholder is a hard failure.

new_pins_W1_3.aw-11: assets/prompts/11-cover-image-prompt.md — cover-image PROMPT generator, MID-WRITER author / IMAGE render; see the cover_prompt block
new_pins_W1_3.aw-12: assets/prompts/12-primary-goal-extraction.md — LIGHT-tier primary-goal extraction wired as the final step of P0A-AVATAR (authoring_sequence); binds {{niche_primary_goal}}

avatar_handoff.$note: W1.2 Skill 54 extension. The pre-P1 phase P0A-AVATAR formally DELEGATES to Skill 52 avatar-alchemist. The three avatar-front prompts (aa-01..aa-03) are REUSED BY PATH and NEVER copied: the handoff reads Skill 52's own pinned assets at the paths below and produces working/avatar.md, which the P0A-AVATAR gate (prove_aw_avatar) REQUIRES fail-closed before P1-FIDELITY and which the downstream tone/chapter authoring templates consume (carried_values). This is the reference-only twin of Skill 53's baked P1-AVATAR (Skill 53 bakes copies into its own prompts/; Skill 54 references Skill 52 in place — PRD Section 7 Reuse map item 3 and SPEC 3.2 item 1). These pins are NOT in source_prompt_pins (that block is for Skill 54's OWN baked authoring IP, checked by prove_aw_fidelity against assets/prompts/); mixing them there would break prove_aw_fidelity. Delegation integrity is enforced by prove_aw_avatar.py (AF-AW-AVATAR-*): the referenced files must resolve at their pinned Skill 52 paths with sha256 == the pins below, or the gate fails closed rather than authoring from stale/tampered/absent IP.
avatar_handoff.reference_mode: by-path — NO file copied; NOT baked into source_prompt_pins
avatar_handoff.pin_provenance: sha256 byte-verified against 52-avatar-alchemist/prompts on origin/main (W0.8 reuse-asset inventory) and re-confirmed against the build checkout; re-checked at runtime by prove_aw_avatar.py
avatar_handoff.no_copy_law: No file under 52-avatar-alchemist/prompts/{01,02,03}-* may be copied into 54-anthology-writer/ (prompts/, assets/prompts/, or anywhere in the skill tree). The avatar IP stays single-sourced in Skill 52. AF-AW-AVATAR-COPIED enforces.
avatar_handoff.tone_core_untouched: This extension adds NO tone stage and touches NO tone asset; prompts/04..08 and the 5 baked authoring prompts (assets/prompts/06-10) are unchanged, so prove_aw_fidelity and verify_tone_core_sync stay green.

stages.research_note: Questions 31-32 expect web-search findings injected as CONTEXT by the caller's Layer 2 tool step (engine search_detect.py; prefer Perplexity, degrade-plus-flag). The pinned prompt text is NEVER edited at runtime; the search is a tool step, not a model or prompt swap (SPEC S1). Absent a search tool the phase degrades with a receipt, it does not fail.

avatar_handoff.not_this_unit: The W1.2 avatar-handoff unit added ONLY the reference-by-path delegation to aa-01..aa-03. Primary-goal extraction (aw-12) is the SEPARATE W1.3 prompt-completion extension and is NOW WIRED as the LIGHT-tier final step of P0A-AVATAR (see phase P0A-AVATAR.authoring_sequence and the aw-12 source_prompt_pins entry, checked at P1-FIDELITY); the optional intake fields ideal_avatar / niche / primary_goal remain the SEPARATE W1.4 (intake fields) extension.

cover_prompt.$note: W1.3 prompt-completion. aw-11 (assets/prompts/11-cover-image-prompt.md) is Skill 54's OWN baked cover-image PROMPT-authoring IP, sha256-pinned in source_prompt_pins and fidelity-checked at P1-FIDELITY. It is AUTHORED on the client's MID-WRITER tier from the LOCKED title/subtitle (aw-06, carried byte-exact), the author name (intake), and the blurb (aw-07), and emits a single JSON cover-prompt object. The RENDER is engine-orchestrated downstream (SPEC S7): the engine's stage_s7_cover.py (W1.14) passes the emitted prompt to the CLIENT's own Kie.ai GPT-image-2 TEXT-TO-IMAGE PORTRAIT endpoint at 2:3 / 1024x1536 via Skills 07 (setup) and 46 (callback relay). Skill 54's own P0-P7 walk does NOT gate the cover (parallel to how aw-10 rewrite is a baked/pinned asset used in the P6 rework loop, not a standalone walked phase); the cover is an engine-side, IMAGE-tier-OPTIONAL stage that degrades to a cover PROMPT doc (degraded:image receipt) when the client configures no image provider.
cover_prompt.produces: a single JSON cover-prompt object {prompt, aspect_ratio:'2:3', output_format:'png'}

render_override.forbids: the 16:9 presentation/deck recipe (Skill 46 default overridden per W0.6)

tiers.HEAVY-WRITER: aw-09 chapter + aw-10 rewrite (client's strongest NON-Anthropic long-form model)
tiers.MID-WRITER: aw-01..08 tone/title/blurb/outline + aw-11 cover-image prompt (client's mid NON-Anthropic model)
tiers.LIGHT: aw-12 primary-goal extraction — split/label the P0A avatar value into Avatar/Niche/Primary Goal (client's light/fast NON-Anthropic model; extraction, not authoring)
tiers.RESEARCHER: optional client web-search tool (degraded:search receipt if absent)
tiers.IMAGE: optional client image provider — renders the aw-11 cover prompt at 2:3 portrait 1024x1536 (degraded:image receipt if absent)

phases.name: Intake (4 required fields, no credential-shaped keys)

preflight.label: working/intake.json present and prove_aw_intake.py PASS — anthology_title / first_name / last_name / chapter_premise all present and non-whitespace; no credential-shaped intake key.

phases.name: Avatar handoff (pre-P1; DELEGATES to Skill 52 avatar-alchemist prompts 01-03 BY PATH, no file copied) + LIGHT-tier primary-goal extraction (aw-12)

authoring_sequence.$note: The P0A avatar-handoff authoring order (run UPSTREAM on the CLIENT's own NON-Anthropic chain before the P0A gate; the pinned prompt text is NEVER edited at runtime). aa-01..aa-03 are the reference-by-path Skill 52 prompts (see avatar_handoff.stages; delegation integrity enforced by prove_aw_avatar.py). aw-12 is Skill 54's OWN baked LIGHT-tier primary-goal extraction step (assets/prompts/12-primary-goal-extraction.md, sha256-pinned in source_prompt_pins, fidelity-checked at P1-FIDELITY): it runs LAST — after aa-03 fuses avatar+niche+goal into one blob — and splits/labels that blob into the carried value niche_primary_goal that every downstream authoring stage (tone/title/outline/chapter/cover) consumes. This is the W1.3 prompt-completion wiring; the P0A gate (prove_aw_avatar) is unchanged (aw-12 is NOT a Skill 52 reference and is deliberately absent from avatar_handoff.stages).

phases.reuse_note: REFERENCE-ONLY handoff (W1.2 ext): the three Skill 52 avatar prompts (aa-01..aa-03) are read at their pinned Skill 52 paths declared in avatar_handoff — NOT copied, NOT baked into source_prompt_pins. Produces the avatar dossier working/avatar.md, REQUIRED fail-closed by this phase's own gate (prove_aw_avatar) before P1-FIDELITY and consumed by the downstream author/rewrite user templates (carried values niche_primary_goal / questions_1_30 / questions_31_32). Tone core and the 5 baked authoring prompts are untouched, so prove_aw_fidelity + verify_tone_core_sync stay green. Inserts BETWEEN P0-INTAKE and P1-FIDELITY; run_anthology.py must carry P0A-AVATAR in PHASE_ORDER (after P0-INTAKE) and map _chk_avatar in _CHECKERS (see cross_file_needs).

preflight.label: prove_aw_avatar.py PASS — working/avatar.md present and non-whitespace (the avatar dossier the Skill 52 handoff produced, consumed downstream by the tone/chapter authoring templates) AND every referenced Skill 52 prompt (aa-01/aa-02/aa-03 x system|user|methodology) resolves at its pinned 52-avatar-alchemist path with sha256 == the avatar_handoff pin (delegation integrity; Skill 52 missing/tampered/version-drifted fails closed, never authors from stale IP) AND no Skill 52 avatar prompt was copied into Skill 54's own tree (no-copy law).
prove_aw_fidelity.py PASS (sha256 of the 5 baked authoring prompts == manifest pins) AND verify_tone_core_sync.py PASS (baked tone stages byte-identical to shared-utils/tone-writing-core).
working/tone-doc.md present — 'The {First} {Last} Tone' synthesized from 4 tone-style influence analyses on the client's MID-WRITER tier.

prove_aw_tone.py PASS over working/tone-doc.md — exactly 4 influence analyses AND >= 3,000 stripped words (tone-core R7). A client-exact tone_word_floor override wins ONLY through the LOGGED, brief-tied working/overrides.json channel; an unlogged override fails closed.
working/title.json present with non-empty title + subtitle — the contributor-LOCKED identity carried byte-exact downstream.

phases.name: Outline + chapter authoring (aw-08 outline, aw-09 chapter, HEAVY-WRITER; aw-07 blurb, MID-WRITER)

preflight.label: working/outline.md AND working/chapter.md present (the one 2,000-3,500-word chapter for this contributor, authored on the client's HEAVY-WRITER tier). The aw-07 back-cover blurb (working/blurb.md, MID-WRITER) is authored in this window and is gated at P7-DELIVER (AF-AW-BLURB-MISSING).

phases.name: Chapter QC (band + block + placeholder + title-lock + story placement + no-Anthropic)

preflight.label: working/RUN-LEDGER.json is REQUIRED (fail-closed model provenance / no-Anthropic proof) AND prove_aw_chapter.py PASS over working/chapter.md (--mode chapter) AND working/outline.md (--mode outline) with --title + --intake, AND aw_build_check.py PASS over working/RUN-LEDGER.json. A client-exact chapter band override wins ONLY through the LOGGED, brief-tied working/overrides.json channel. ANY AF-AW-* violation blocks advance; a bounded rework loop (<=2, verifier != author) re-authors then re-proves. Writes the prover verdict to working/qc/chapter_qc_report.json.

phases.name: Deliver (labeled local bundle + certificate on a full pass)

preflight.label: the labeled deliverable bundle is assembled locally from the QC'd working copies (chapter/tone-doc/outline/title/blurb) and byte-verified; a QC'd source that is MISSING fails closed (AF-AW-STAGE-SKIPPED) and a pre-existing delivery file that DISAGREES with its QC'd source is refused (AF-AW-DELIVER-MISMATCH). The promised back-cover blurb (working/blurb.md) is REQUIRED and must be finalized prose (non-empty, no unresolved placeholder, not a stub) or the phase fails closed (AF-AW-BLURB-MISSING). After certification the same artifacts are copied into the labeled ~/Downloads/Anthology-<slug>-<MM-DD-YYYY>/ bundle (chapter, tone doc, outline, title, blurb, DELIVERY-NOTE.md, handoff.json, PROCESS-CERTIFICATE). NO n8n / Airtable / Google Drive / Slack / Gmail. A signed process certificate is issued only after a full P0->P6 pass. Any push is per-client config through the client's own gateway, client-silent by default.

autofails.trigger: any of the 4 required fields (anthology_title / first_name / last_name / chapter_premise) missing, empty, or whitespace
an intake key looks like a secret (api_key, token, openrouter, anthropic, password, ...) — provider keys never ride intake
working/avatar.md is absent, empty, or whitespace-only at the pre-P1 avatar phase — the Skill 52 handoff produced no avatar dossier for the downstream authoring templates to consume

a referenced Skill 52 avatar prompt (aa-01/aa-02/aa-03 x system|user|methodology) is missing at its pinned 52-avatar-alchemist path OR its sha256 != the avatar_handoff pin — Skill 52 not installed, tampered, or version-drifted; the reference-by-path delegation must resolve to the exact pinned IP or fail closed (no silent stale-IP fallback)

a Skill 52 avatar prompt (01/02/03-*) was COPIED into Skill 54's own tree (prompts/, assets/prompts/, or elsewhere) instead of referenced by path — violates the handoff no-copy law (PRD Section 7 Reuse map item 3; avatar IP stays single-sourced in Skill 52)
sha256 of a baked authoring prompt != its manifest pin, an asset is missing, or an unpinned prompt file appeared
a baked tone stage (prompts/04..08) drifts from shared-utils/tone-writing-core
the blended tone doc does not reference exactly 4 distinct tone-style influence analyses (indices 1..4)
measured stripped word count of the tone doc below the 3,000 floor (tone-core R7; padding inert)
working/title.json missing or its title/subtitle empty
measured stripped word count of the chapter outside 2,000-3,500 (self-report ignored; whitespace padding inert)
the mandatory COMPLETION VERIFICATION block is absent from the chapter
an unresolved {{..}} / [[..]] / <ALLCAPS> placeholder survived into a finalized artifact
the locked title and/or subtitle is not carried byte-exact into the outline and chapter
a non-N/A personal-story anchor is not placed in the outline and chapter
a model id in RUN-LEDGER.json matches /anthropic|claude/i, or an operator credential name is present in the run env (G-NOANTHROPIC build-fix)
rewrite_count exceeds the max (2) — runaway rework

working/RUN-LEDGER.json is absent at P6, or it records NO resolved model id (empty/absent stages) — model provenance is required (fail-closed) so the no-Anthropic gate can never pass vacuously on an unproven run

a client-exact band override (working/overrides.json) was applied but is not provably logged and tied to the locked brief (missing source/approved_by/reason, or a brief_ref that does not match the intake) — an unlogged override is a silent floor-swap and fails closed
a pre-existing delivery/ artifact disagrees byte-for-byte with its QC'd working source (a swap-after-QC / planted deliverable), or a labeled copy did not round-trip byte-identical

the promised back-cover blurb (working/blurb.md) is absent (AF-AW-STAGE-SKIPPED at the missing-artifact check) or present-but-unfinished — empty, an unresolved placeholder, or a stub under the anti-stub minimum — so it cannot ship in the labeled bundle
a resolved run-dir model-map.json still carries <CLIENT_*> placeholders — the fleet installer has not resolved this box's providers (preflight.sh --check pre-gate)
a phase was attempted out of order or the certificate chain is broken
a certificate was requested without a full P0->P6 pass
a hand-rolled uploader/notifier (Google Drive / Slack / Gmail / n8n webhook / Airtable) is present in the run directory, bypassing the local-labeled-deliverable handoff
the enforcement-set content hash does not match the pinned head (ENGINE-PIN.sha256, when present)
